subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath lifted the veil, drawn aside the covering, and made manifest the beauty of truth unveiled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی رفع الحجاب و کشف النقاب و اظهر جمال الحقیقة مکشوفا
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transcendence; unknowability of God
